name: Legal
description: Contracts, trademarks, licensing, litigation and legal secretarial work.

items.title: Renew Trade License / Shops & Establishment
items.description: Annual renewal of shops & establishment registration / trade license with municipal corporation.

items.title: Trademark renewal
items.description: Renew registered trademarks every 10 years — track each mark's own anniversary.

items.title: Factory License renewal
items.description: Renew Factories Act license with the Directorate of Industrial Safety & Health.

items.title: Pollution Board — Consent to Operate
items.description: Review Consent to Operate under Water Act & Air Act. Renew before expiry.

items.title: Vendor & customer contract review
items.description: Review recurring vendor NDAs, distribution agreements, and channel contracts for expiry / renewal.

items.title: Update litigation tracker
items.description: Update status of pending cases, next hearing dates, and counsel instructions.

items.title: Policy review (Privacy, Returns, T&Cs)
items.description: Annual review of website privacy policy, return policy, and T&Cs on Amazon/Shopify storefronts.

items.title: Update Udyam Registration
items.description: Annual self-declaration of turnover and investment figures on Udyam portal.

items.title: FSSAI License renewal
items.description: Renew Food Safety license (if applicable). Renew 30 days before expiry.
